seo_description: Current time in Vientiane, Laos. Indochina Time (ICT, UTC+7) year-round — no DST. Same time as Bangkok & Phnom Penh. Live clock.

faq.question: What time is it in Vientiane right now?
faq.answer: Vientiane, Laos uses Indochina Time (ICT, UTC+7) year-round. Laos does not observe Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is Asia/Vientiane. Vientiane shares the same time zone as Bangkok (Thailand), Phnom Penh (Cambodia), and Ho Chi Minh City (Vietnam) — all at UTC+7. The live clock above shows the current Vientiane time.

faq.question: What time zone is Vientiane in?
faq.answer: Vientiane, Laos is in the Indochina Time zone (ICT, UTC+7) year-round. The IANA identifier is Asia/Vientiane. Laos does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Vientiane shares this time zone with Bangkok, Ho Chi Minh City, Hanoi, and Phnom Penh.

faq.question: Does Vientiane observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Vientiane and Laos do not observe Daylight Saving Time. Laos uses ICT (UTC+7) permanently year-round. All of mainland Southeast Asia — Thailand, Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia — does not observe DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Vientiane and London?
faq.answer: Vientiane (ICT, UTC+7) is 7 hours ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During British Summer Time (BST, UTC+1), Vientiane is 6 hours ahead. Laos does not observe DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Vientiane and New York?
faq.answer: Vientiane (ICT, UTC+7) is 12 hours ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US DST (EDT, UTC-4), Vientiane is 11 hours ahead. Laos does not observe DST.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Vientiane?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Vientiane are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM ICT, Monday through Friday. Vientiane is Laos's capital and largest city, located on the Mekong River bordering Thailand. Laos has one of Southeast Asia's fastest-growing economies, driven by hydropower exports to Thailand and China, mining, and tourism. The Lao Securities Exchange (LSX) is the national stock exchange.
